id.description: The ID of the attack template

name.description: The name of the attack template

description.description: The description of the attack template

system_defined.description: A read-only flag that indicates if the Attack Template is system-defined (immutable)

browser_encoding_enabled.description: A flag that is used to enforce browser encoding on all attacks

advanced_attacks_enabled.description: A flag to enable advanced Attacks

false_positive_regex.description: Regex used to indicate a false positive
